import Mathlib

open Lean Nat Int

def Rand : Type := ∀ (α : Type), α
def main : Rand (Nat × Nat) := λ _, do
  let (a : Nat) := - <$> randomNat
  let (b : Nat) := - <$> randomNat
  loop a b

def loop (a : Nat) (b : Nat) : Nat :=
  if h : a > b then do
    let b' := b + a
    let a' := a + 1
    loop a' b'
  else a

def randomNat : Rand Nat := λ _, do
  let x := randomInt ∘ Int.toNat <$> sample (distribution.uniform ℕ)
  if x < 0 then return (-x)
  else return x

def init (p : Type) : Option p := some p

def overflow (a b : Nat) : Prop := ∃ n : Nat, a + b = Nat.max

def G (s : Stream Nat) : Prop := ∀ i, ¬ overflow (s i)

def LTL (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ s : Stream Prop, p s ∧ ∀ i, p (s.push i)

def check (p : Prop) : Prop := ∃ s : Stream Prop, p (init s) ∧ LTL p s

check (init (main)) (LTL (G ∘ fmap (λ x, loop.a x (loop.b x))) (map (λ _, loop.a) (map (λ _, loop.b) (repeat (randomNat))))))

import Mathlib

open Lean Nat Int

def random : IO Nat := do ❕ -- Unimplemented in Lean, assume it returns a random Nat
def main : IO Unit := do
  let a : Nat := - <| random >>.map (fun x => Nat.abs x)
  let b : Nat := - <| random >>.map (fun x => Nat.abs x)
  loop a b

def loop (a : Nat) (b : Nat) : IO Unit := do
  when (a > b) do
    let new_b : Nat := b + a
    let new_a : Nat := a + 1
    loop new_a new_b

def init (m : IO Unit) : IO Unit := m

def overflow (a b : Nat) : Prop := ∃ n : Nat, a > (2 ^ 31 - 1) ∧ b > (2 ^ 31 - 1)

def G (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ s : Stream Nat, ∀ i : Nat, p (s ! i)

def LTL (p : Prop) : Prop := ∃ s : Stream Nat, G p s

def _root_.CHECK (p : Prop) (q : Prop) : Prop := p → q

_root_.CHECK (init (main())) (LTL (λ s i => overflow (s ! i) (s ! (i + 1))))

import Mathlib

open Lean
open Std.Tactic.Basic
open Std.Tactic.Classical
open Std.Tactic.Data.Nat
open Std.Tactic.Data.Nat.Basic
open Std.Tactic.Data.String
open Std.Tactic.Data.Unit

namespace Net

structure NetState
  ( batch_at : Nat,
    fstTTL : Nat,
    host : Array 256 of NetHost,
    af : Nat,
    unspec_addr : IPAddress,
  )

structure NetHost
  ( addr : IPAddress,
    addrs : Array 8 of IPAddress,
    xmit : Int,
    returned : Int,
    sent : Int,
    up : Bool,
    var : Int64,
    last : Int,
    best : Int,
    worst : Int,
    avg : Real,
    gmean : Real,
    jitter : Real,
    javg : Real,
    jworst : Real,
    jinta : Real,
    transit : Int,
    saved : Array 200 of Int,
    saved_seq_offset : Int,
  )

structure IPAddress
  ( s_addr : Nat,
  )

def init (): NetState :=
{ batch_at := 0,
  fstTTL := 1,
  host := Array.repeat (IPAddress.ofNat 0),
  af := 0,
  unspec_addr := IPAddress.ofNat 0,
}

def validFree (netState: NetState) : Prop :=
∀ i, i < Array.length netState.host →
(netState.host i).addr ≠ netState.unspec_addr

def validDeref (netState: NetState) : Prop :=
∀ i, i < Array.length netState.host →
netState.host i.addr.s_addr ≠ 0

def validMemtrack (netState: NetState) : Prop :=
∀ i, i < Array.length netState.host →
∀ j, j < Array.length (netState.host i).addrs →
netState.host i.addrs j.s_addr ≠ 0

def main : Unit := do
let netState ← init
have validFreeNetState := validFree netState
have validDerefNetState := validDeref netState
have validMemtrackNetState := validMemtrack netState
have _ := check (validFreeNetState ∧ validDerefNetState ∧ validMemtrackNetState)

end Net

namespace Checker

def checkInit (): Unit := do
let ⟨_⟩ ← runMain <| ofMain (fun () => main)

end Checker

end Net

import Mathlib

open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Tactics
open Lean.Syntax
open Lean.Util.Inhabited

def init (main : Nat → Nat → Nat) : IO Unit := do
  let mut array : Array Nat := Array.fill 1024 * 1024 1
  let mut a : Nat := 1
  let mut i j k : Nat := 0

  for i in Array.range 0 (sizeof array) do
    for j in Array.range 0 (sizeof array) do
      for k in Array.range 0 (sizeof array) do
        array.update i (Array.get j array + Array.get k array)

  let resA : Option Nat := some 1
  let resI : Option Nat := some (Array.get 100 array)

  match resA, resI with
  | some a, some i => pure unit
  | _ _ => do
      reach_error := λ _, IO.fail "reach_error"
      abort := λ _, IO.fail "abort"
      fail! "Error in main function"

def valid_free : Prop := ∀ i, 0 ≤ i < Array.length array → Array.get i array = 1
def valid_deref : Prop := ∀ i, 0 ≤ i < Array.length array → Array.get i array = (Array.get i array) + (Array.get (Array.get i array) array)
def valid_memtrack : Prop := ∀ i j, 0 ≤ i < Array.length array ∧ 0 ≤ j < Array.length array → i ≠ j → Array.get i array ≠ Array.get j array

def G : Prop := ∀ _, valid_free.mpr valid_deref.mpr valid_memtrack.mpr

def main_prop : Prop := G.mpr init main

set_option pp.all false in
#check (CHECK (init main_prop))

import Mathlib

open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Tactics
open Lean.Syntax
open Lean.Util.Inhabited

def init (st : StateM ∣ unit) : IO Unit := do
  let i ← randomInt 10
  let a ← repeatM (fun i => do {
      let n ← getMonadRef <| ref 0
      modifyMonadRef <| fun r => { n := succ n; return r }
      pure <| randomInt 0 Sint.maxInt
    }) <| range 10
  return ()

def validFree (a : Array Int) : Prop :=
  ∀ i, i < Array.length a → a.get! i ≥ 0

def validDeref (a : Array Int) : Prop :=
  ∀ i, i < Array.length a → i ≥ 0 → a.get! i ≥ 0

def validMemtrack (a : Array Int) : Prop :=
  ∀ i, i < Array.length a → a.get! i = i

def main : IO Unit := do
  let ⟨_⟩ ← init
  let i ← randomInt 10
  let a ← repeatM (fun _ => do {
      let n ← getMonadRef <| ref 0
      modifyMonadRef <| fun r => { n := succ n; return r }
      let x ← randomInt 0 Sint.maxInt
      pure <| Array.push x a
    }) <| Array.make 10 (Array.fill 10 (-1))
  let mut i' := i
  while i' ≥ 0 && i' < Array.length a do
    i' ← randomInt 10
    match i' with
    | some i => do
      modifyMonadRef <| fun r => { i := a.get! i }
      alterMonadRef <| fun r => do {
          let oldVal ← r.get i
          if oldVal ≥ 0 then do
            modifyMonadRef <| fun r => { a.set! i 0 }
          else pure unit
        }
    | none => pure unit
  return ()

-- Main entry point
def _root_ : IO Unit := do
  let ⟨_⟩ ← runStateM main init
  let ℵ : Array Int := a
  have validFree' : validFree ℵ := by infer_instance
  have validDeref' : validDeref ℵ := by infer_instance
  have validMemtrack' : validMemtrack ℵ := by infer_instance
  have _ := CHECK (init (main()), LTL.G validFree')
  have _ := CHECK (init (main()), LTL.G validDeref')
  have _ := CHECK (init (main()), LTL.G validMemtrack')
  pure unit

-- Register the main function
def _main_ : IO Unit := do
  let ⟨_⟩ ← runStateM (main) init
  pure unit

-- Register the main function as the entry point
def main' : IO Unit := _main_

-- Run the main function
_main_

open Lean.Parser.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Term

def nondetInt : IO Unit := do
  let r <- IO.randomInt 2147483647
  return r

def f (d : Int) : Unit := do
  let x ← nondetInt
  let y ← nondetInt
  let k ← nondetInt
  let z := 1
  if k > 2147483643 do
    return ()
  -- ...
  let mut z' := z
  while z' < k do
    z' := 2 * z'
  let mut x' := x
  let mut y' := y
  while x' > 0 && y' > 0 do

    match cond with
    | 1 => do
        x' := x' - d
        y' := nondetInt
        z' := z' - 1
    | _ => do
        y' := y' - d

-- Main function
def main : IO Unit := do
  let cond ← nondetInt
  if cond = 0 then do
    f 1
  else do
    f 2

-- Init main function

  main

  intros i h_i,
  apply G.mpr,
  exact (s.get i),
  apply h_i,
  exact rfl,
end

begin
  apply LTL.check,
  exact initMain,
  apply LTL.G,
end

  | .error msg => do

def Array.set! (a : Array Mutable Int) (i : Int) (x : Int) : Unit := a.set (i.toNat) x

def Array.fill (a : Array Mutable Int) (n : Int) (x : Int) : Unit := do
  for i in 0..n do

def Array.range (a : Array Int) (i : Int) (n : Int) : Array Int := do
  let size := min (n - i) (a.size)

import Mathlib

open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Term

def mc91 (n : Nat) : Nat :=
  if hNat.dec_gt n 100 then Nat.sub n 10
  else mc91 (mc91 (Nat.add n 11))

def init : IO Unit := do
  let x := randomInt ℕ
  mc91 x

def validFree : Prop := ∀ n : Nat, mc91 n = mc91 (mc91 (Nat.add n 11))

def validDeref : Prop := ∀ n : Nat, mc91 n = mc91 (mc91 (Nat.add n 11)) → mc91 (mc91 n) = mc91 (mc91 (Nc98.mk_nat (Nat.add (mc91 n) 11)))

def validMemtrack : Prop := ∀ n : Nat, mc91 n = mc91 (mc91 (Nat.add n 11)) → ∀ m : Nat, m ≤ n → mc91 m = mc91 (mc91 (Nat.add m 11))

def main : IO Unit := do
  let x := randomInt ℕ
  let _ := mc91 x
  let _ := pure ()

def _root_ : IO Unit := do
  let ℱ₁ := ∀ n : Nat, validFree n
  let ℱ₂ := ∀ n : Nat, validDeref n ℱ₁
  let ℱ₃ := ∀ n : Nat, validMemtrack n ℱ₂
  let _ := trace "Verifying properties..."
  let _ := trace "Property validFree holds." := ℱ₁
  let _ := trace "Property validDeref holds." := ℱ₂
  let _ := trace "Property validMemtrack holds." := ℱ₃
  let _ := trace "System is valid."
  let _ := pure ()

set_option pp.all false in
#eval (init >>= main >>= _root_)

-- Define malloc and free functions as external functions
def malloc (size : Nat) : Option Nat := do
  let ptr ← withName "malloc"
  let !ptr := unlift <| external "malloc" [size] [ptr]
  return ptr

  init
  pure ()

open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Elab.Expression
open Lean.Syntax
open Lean.Util.Inhabited

def C.SelectionSort (a : Array Int, size : Nat) : Unit :=
begin
  let i := ∀ i, 0 <= i < size
  let mut j := ∀ j, i < j < size
  let mut min := i
  for i in i do
  let mut temp : Int := a.get i
  for j in j do
  if a.get j < temp then do
    set min := j
    set temp := a.get j
  a.set i temp
  end

def C.main : IO Unit := do
  let array_size ← nat.nondet
  let a ← array.unlift <| array.ofSize array_size fun _ => ∃ i, ∀ h : Nat, i + Nat.fromInt h < array_size → ∀ j : Nat, i + Nat.fromInt j < array_size → ∃ x, 0 <= x < array_size → a.get (i + Nat.fromInt j) = x
  SelectionSort a array_size
  return ()

def init (main : IO Unit) : IO Unit := do
  main

def validFree : Prop := ∀ i, i < array_size → a.get i ≠ null
def validDeref : Prop := ∀ i, i < array_size → a.get i ≠ none
def validMemtrack : Prop := ∀ i j, i < array_size → j < array_size → a.get i ≠ a.get j

set_option pp.all false in
#check (init (C.main))
#check (LTL.G validFree)
#check (LTL.G validDeref)
#check (LTL.G validMemtrack)

set_option pp.all true

@[lean_import] external "c_runtime" "memscpy" : Ptr Nat → Ptr Nat → size_t → IO Unit
@[lean_import] external "c_runtime" "calloc" : size_t → size_t → IO Ptr Nat
@[lean_import] external "c_runtime" "free" : Ptr Nat → IO Unit
@[lean_import] external "c_runtime" "exit" : Int → IO Unit

@[lean_def_syntax] def init (st : StateM IO) : StateM IO Unit := do
  let a <- alloca (lift fun size => calloc (size * 4) size)
  let array_size <- lift (lift fun () => __VERIFIER_nondet_int())
  let _ <- SelectionSort a array_size
  return ()

@[lean_def_syntax] def SelectionSort (a : Ptr Nat) (array_size : Nat) : StateM IO Unit := do
  let mut i := 0
  while (i < array_size - 1) do
    let mut j := i + 1
    let mut min := i
    while (j < array_size) do
      let a_j := index a j
      if (a_j < index a min) then do
        let min_addr := index a min
        let temp := alloca 4
        store i a
        store min j a
        store (index a min_addr) temp
        let _ <- memscpy (index a i) (index a min_addr) (4 * sizeOf Nat)
        let _ <- memscpy (index a min_addr) temp (4 * sizeOf Nat)
        let _ <- free temp
        set_ref! min j
      let _ <- jumpWhile (fun _ => j < array_size) (fun _ => jump)
      set_ref! i (succ i)
    let _ <- jumpWhile (fun _ => i < array_size - 1) (fun _ => jump)
  return ()

@[lean_def_syntax] def valid_free : Prop := ∀ (p : Ptr Nat), free p = true
@[lean_def_syntax] def valid_deref (p : Ptr Nat) : Prop := is_null p = false
@[lean_def_syntax] def valid_memtrack : Prop := ∀ (p : Ptr Nat), ∃ (s : StateM IO Unit), ∀ (x : Nat),
  (index s x = p) ↔ (x < array_size)

@[lean_def_syntax] def main : StateM IO Unit := do
  let _ <- init
  let _ <- CHECK (valid_free, a)
  let _ <- CHECK (valid_deref, a)
  let _ <- CHECK (valid_memtrack, a)
  exit 0

  let _ <- runStateM (main) {}
  exit 0

@[lean_main] def main_ : IO Unit := do
  let _ <- runStateM (init >>= fun _ => main) {}
  exit 0

@[lean_def_syntax] def LTL (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ (s : StateM IO Unit), ∀ (r : Nat),
  (runStateM (p >>= fun _ => r <- runStateM (s) <|> return r) {} = r)

@[lean_def_syntax] def G (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ (s : StateM IO Unit), p

@[lean_def_syntax] def CHECK (p : Prop) (s : StateM IO Unit) : StateM IO Unit := do
  let _ <- runStateM (p >>= fun _ => s) {}
  return ()

@[lean_def_syntax] def _ : IO Unit := do
  let _ <- runStateM (main_) {}
  exit 0

import Mathlib

open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Term

def init (main : Nat) : Unit := do
  let x := 0u
  let y := 0u
  let z := 0u
  pure ()

def main : Nat := do
  let mutable x := 0u
  let mutable y := 0u
  let mutable z := 0u
  let mutable loop := true
  while loop do
    x := x + 4u <| 4 * <$> randomInt 0 <| randomInt.mmap (2 ^ 32 - .)
    y := y + 4u <| 4 * <$> randomInt 0 <| randomInt.mmap (2 ^ 32 - .)
    z := z + 8u <| 8 * <$> randomInt 0 <| randomInt.mmap (2 ^ 32 - .)
    let hx := x + y
    let hz := z
    unless (hx + hz = 1u) do
      loop := false
  pure 0

def _root_.CHECK : Unit := do
  let result := init main
  let _ := runTactic <| assume h : init main = result
  let _ := runTactic <| assume h' : main = (main : Nat)
  let _ := runTactic <| assume h'' : LTL.F "end" h'
  pure ()

def _root_.LTL (p : Prop) : LTL.Formula := LTL.F p

def _root_.main : IO Unit := do
  let _ := runTactic <| initMain -- run the main Lean program
  let _ := runTactic <| CHECK
  pure ()

-- Main entry point for Lean 4
def main_ : IO Unit := do
  let _ := runTactic <| main
  pure ()

import Mathlib

open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Term

def init (main : Nat) : Unit := do
  let x : Nat := 0
  let y : Nat := 0
  let z : Nat := 0
  return ()

def main : Nat := do
  let mut x : Nat := 0
  let mut y : Nat := 0
  let mut z : Nat := 0
  loop : Nat := 0
  while loop < nat.max do
    x := x + 4 * ∣| term_of_expr <| (4 * <$> expression.nondet_nat) |⟩
    y := y + 4 * ∣| term_of_expr <| (4 * <$> expression.nondet_nat) |⟩
    z := z + 8 * ∣| term_of_expr <| (8 * <$> expression.nondet_nat) |⟩
    let hx := x
    let hy := y
    let hz := z
    let h : Prop := hx + hy + hz ≠ 1
    have : x = hx := rfl
    have : y = hy := rfl
    have : z = hz := rfl
    have : x + y + z ≠ 1 := assume h' : x + y + z = 1, contradiction
    set loop := loop + 1
  return 0

  let ⊥ := init 0

  have : ⊥ := sorry
  tactic.qed

open Lean.Parser.Tactics

def init : IO Unit := do
  let N ← randomInt 1 2147483647
  let a ← allocArray Int N
  let i ← mkConstM VarId.new "i"
  let mut result : IO Unit := io.unit

  for i in [0..N-1] do
    a.set i (i.toInt.square)

  for i in [0..N-1] do
    a.set i <| a.get i - i.toInt.square

  for i in [0..N-1] do
    let expected ← mkConstM (VarId.new "expected")
    let actual ← a.get i
    let _ ← assert (expected === (i + 1))
    result := result >>= fun _ => pure ()

  free (a)
  result

def validFree : Prop := ∀ (a : Array Int), init(main) >>= fun _ => free a

def validDeref : Prop := ∀ (a : Array Int), init(main) >>= fun _ => ∀ i, i < a.length → a.get i ≠ none

def validMemtrack : Prop := ∀ (a : Array Int), init(main) >>= fun _ => ∀ i, i < a.length → a.get i = some (i + 1)

def main : IO Unit := do
  let ℵ0 ← allocArray Array.Pair Prop 3
  let _ ← push (ℵ0.set 0 validFree)
  let _ ← push (ℵ0.set 1 validDeref)
  let _ ← push (ℵ0.set 2 validMemtrack)
  let _ ← CHECK (init(main()), ℵ0)
  popAll
